title: carduus lanatus
intro: Carduus lanatus, also known as Woolly Thistle or Woolly Milk Thistle, is a flowering plant species in the thistle family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Carduus lanatus include reducing oxidative stress, improving liver function, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
